title: Fix admin role assignment error

requirements.text: Fix the backend admin role assignment logic so that calling `adminLogin(username, password)` correctly grants the admin role to the caller's principal without throwing an error.

quotes: Admin role assign करता आला नाही. पुन्हा प्रयत्न करा. ही error येत आहे

acceptanceCriteria: Calling adminLogin with valid admin credentials successfully assigns the admin role to the authenticated principal.
No error is returned when valid admin credentials are provided.
The admin role persists across subsequent calls so the user is recognized as admin.

requirements.text: Fix the frontend admin login flow in App.tsx so that after Internet Identity authentication completes, the adminLogin call is made correctly, errors are caught and displayed to the user, and on success the user is routed to the admin dashboard.

quotes: Admin role assign करता आला नाही. पुन्हा प्रयत्न करा. ही error येत आहे

acceptanceCriteria: After completing Internet Identity login with admin credentials, adminLogin is called and a success response routes the user to the admin dashboard.
If adminLogin returns an error, a clear error message is displayed to the user on the login page.
The login flow does not silently fail — any backend error is surfaced in the UI.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all Motoko logic within the single backend/main.mo actor.
nonGoals: Adding new user roles beyond the existing admin and user roles.
Changing the Internet Identity authentication mechanism.
Modifying the overall page routing structure beyond fixing the admin post-login redirect.
